name: Stock or input information is inaccurate
description: The count, availability, or readiness information the team is using does not match reality closely enough to make clean decisions.
source_ref: universal-signal-gold-set-01: stock or input inaccuracy expressed through restaurant availability and count control
evidence_types: recorded stock does not match actual stock
team relies on availability information that proves wrong
count-based decisions fail because the inputs are inaccurate
